title: Pap Smear Self-Exam #2: You don’t ‘fall into’ TV - you fight your way in
summary: I didn’t wait for someone to hand me a seat at the table—I built my own damn chair. Self Exam Chapter 2 is the unfiltered story of how I got my big TV break, the mistakes that almost cost me everything, and why authenticity is my ultimate power play. And yeah—what’s next might just be the craziest chapter yet: Sin City Rehab, premiering September 17th at 9/8c. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

title: Pap Smear Self Exam #1: From $5 Footlongs to Full-Blown Fame
summary: Before the cameras. Before the chaos. Before I was flipping houses on TV I was just a girl with a dream, a serious work ethic, and a very random detour as the cover star of Hot Boat magazine (yes, really). In this first Self Exam, I take you all the way back to the beginning. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

title: Pap Smear Appointment #9: Losing Bob Saget
summary: In Appointment #9, I sit down with my friend Kelly Rizzo to talk about life after the unimaginable: losing the love of her life and cautiously  letting love back in. This episode is personal. It’s powerful. And it’s the kind of conversation that stays with you long after it’s over. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

title: Pap Smear Appointment #8: Low Key IRL - Staying Relevant, Unbothered & On TV
summary: What does “low key IRL” mean? We don’t know either … but we’re living it. In Appointment #8, I sit down with my ride-or-die and design powerhouse Taniya Nayak to talk about staying relevant in a business that’s constantly trying to reinvent itself. We talk longevity, reinvention, reinvention again, and why showing up as your whole damn self is the real secret to success. It’s loud, unfiltered, and full of real talk from two women who’ve outlasted the trends, the trolls, and the algorithms. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

title: Pap Smear Appointment #7: The Stuff We’re Doing to Stay Young AF
summary: Fertility isn’t just about freezing eggs — it’s about taking control. In Appointment #7, I sit down with my fertility doctor (and fellow patient) Dr. Roohi Jeelani to talk hormones, heartbreak, and the science that’s giving women more time and power. We break down the truth about egg freezing, how peptides may be the ultimate age-defying secret, and why fighting for your future isn’t selfish — it’s survival. ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. title: Pap Smear Appointment #6: How Retta Went From Parks & Punchlines to Real Estate WTFs
summary: She went from stand-up to sledgehammers—and made it iconic. In this episode, Retta and I spill the behind-the-scenes chaos of Ugliest House in America, her unexpected HGTV glow-up, and the career twist no one (not even her) saw coming. It’s raw, it’s hilarious, and it’s completely unfiltered—just how we like it. ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. Want more? title: Pap Smear Appointment #5: My Breakdown that led to a Breakthrough
summary: Before I found love with someone else, I had to face myself. In Appointment #5, I sit down with my Hoffman Process coach Drew Horning — the man who helped guide my emotional reset. We talk about all about the process everyone’s dying to know about.  About healing, pattern-breaking, and how choosing myself led me to real love. If you’re stuck, spiraling, or settling—this one’s your wake-up call.

title: Pap Smear Appointment #4: When Money, Men & Survival Collide
summary: Send us a text This isn’t about gold digging—it’s about survival. In this episode, I sit down with Never Date a Broke Dude author Pattie Ehsaei to talk about financial independence, dating red flags and the life-altering moment that inspired her book. The truth? Money isn’t just power—it’s protection. Every woman needs to hear this. ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. Want more? title: Pap Smear Appointment #3: He got snipped, I got sober. Here’s how our love story really started
summary: Send us a text From scalpels to soulmates… In this episode, I sit down with my love, Brandt Andersen, to talk about *our*  kind of intimacy—the kind that includes being in the room for his vasectomy (yes, really). We unpack our story, the moment I decided to stop drinking forever and how love can look wildly different from what you expected… and still be everything you need. This one’s raw and revealing - just how we like it. #PapSmearPodcast #SeeYouNextTuesday #SnipSnipHooray ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. Want more? title: Pap Smear Appointment #2: From the Line to the Limelight — Food, Fame & F*ck-Ups
summary: Send us a text Before there were cameras, there were kitchens—and chaos. In this episode, I sit down with my badass friend and celebrity chef Antonia Lofaso to talk about how we both went from hustle-mode nobodies to television somebodies. We get into the early grind, the reality TV circus, and the unglamorous moments that never make the cut. Spoiler: It wasn’t always pretty—but it sure as hell made a story. This one’s for the girls with big dreams, thick skin, and no Plan B. ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. Want more? title: Pap Smear Appointment #1: Fake Weddings, Freezing Eggs and F**k Playing Nice
summary: Send us a text In this raw, no-holds-barred debut, Alison Victoria shreds the script, flips the table and sets fire to the filtered version of herself you’ve seen on TV. Why start a podcast? Because she’s tired of playing by the rules. She breaks it all down – from her fake wedding (yes, that happened) to surviving 24 rounds of egg freezing that pushed her to the edge. No sugarcoating. No soft lighting. Just the messy, complicated and sometimes hilarious truth about life behind the scenes. If you’re looking for the real Alison - the one who’s been through hell and came back laughing – you just found her. Ready to go deep? Hit play. ✨New episodes drop every Tuesday✨ Available wherever you get your podcasts. Want more? Join us at @papsmearpodcast + @thealisonvictoria  For advertising opportunities, please contact: jax@brieflygorgeousproductions.com christine@brieflygorgeousproductions.com
